description: sciqnt org Renovate preset. Repos extend it with: { "extends": ["github>sciqnt/sq-constitution"] }. Detects dependency bumps (esp. sciqnt-contract), labels them `dependencies` so the dependency-migration agent reacts, and keeps merges HUMAN-GATED (automerge off — the principle-review + a person decide).

packageRules.description: Group sciqnt-* component deps; the migration agent reacts to the `dependencies` label
